subject: Order arrived with missing items
resolution: Customer's order was missing a side. Walked them through Orders → Get help → Report an issue → select missing items. Refunded the missing item as FoodAssist AI credit instantly.

subject: Food arrived cold
resolution: Order was delayed in traffic and arrived cold. Apologized, refunded 50% to the original card (3-5 business days), and applied a $5 credit for the inconvenience.

subject: Order is very late
resolution: Courier was stuck due to weather. Showed the customer the live map, confirmed the courier was en route, and offered a credit since it was over 15 minutes past the estimate.

subject: Where is my order right now
resolution: Directed customer to the Orders tab live map. Order was at 'On the way' with an 8-minute ETA. After pickup they could message the courier directly.

subject: Payment declined at checkout
resolution: Card had expired. Guided customer to Account → Payment → Add card to add a new card, then retry checkout. Order went through successfully.

subject: Card keeps getting declined
resolution: Bank fraud check was blocking the charge. Advised customer to approve it in their banking app or call their bank; alternatively use Apple Pay. Payment succeeded with Apple Pay.

subject: Charged twice for one order
resolution: One charge was a temporary authorization hold that dropped off automatically within a few days. Confirmed only one charge settled. No action needed.

subject: Pending charge I don't recognize
resolution: Explained the pending amount was a card authorization hold, not a real charge. It cleared within a few days once the order settled.

subject: Refund hasn't shown up yet
resolution: Refund was approved 2 days prior. Explained card refunds take 3-5 business days and to check the same card. Offered to switch it to instant account credit instead, which the customer accepted.

subject: How do refunds work
resolution: Explained refunds can be taken as instant FoodAssist AI credit or back to the original card in 3-5 business days, chosen under Get help → Report an issue.

subject: Can't reset password - no email
resolution: Reset email was in spam. Confirmed correct account email; reset links are valid 1 hour. Customer reset successfully. Suggested Sign in with code as an alternative since they signed up by phone.

subject: Forgot password and locked out
resolution: Sent reset link via Forgot password?. Customer set a new 8-character password with a number and signed in. Recommended enabling 2FA.

subject: Order marked delivered but never received
resolution: Reviewed courier GPS drop-off; address had a wrong unit number saved. Refunded the order in full and helped the customer fix their saved address.

subject: Courier left order at wrong door
resolution: Courier dropped at the building entrance instead of the unit. Refunded the order and added a note to the saved address with clearer drop-off instructions.

subject: Need to cancel order after restaurant started cooking
resolution: Explained orders can't be cancelled free once the restaurant starts preparing. As a goodwill gesture, offered partial FoodAssist AI credit. Customer accepted.

subject: Cancelled order but still charged
resolution: The charge was a pending hold from before cancellation; it dropped off automatically. Confirmed no settled charge remained.

subject: How to cancel FoodAssist Plus
resolution: Walked customer through Account → FoodAssist Plus → Manage membership → Cancel. Benefits continue until end of current billing period; membership fee is non-refundable mid-cycle.

subject: Charged for FoodAssist Plus I didn't want
resolution: Free trial had converted to paid. Explained the fee is non-refundable mid-cycle but cancelled future renewals; customer keeps benefits until period end.

subject: Wrong delivery address on active order
resolution: Courier had not yet picked up, so edited the delivery address to a nearby location via Orders → Edit delivery details. Large changes aren't possible once a courier is assigned.

subject: Want to change address but courier already picked up
resolution: Address couldn't be changed post-pickup. Had customer message the courier with the correct unit number for drop-off; delivery completed successfully.

subject: Promo code not working
resolution: Order was below the promo's minimum order value and the code had an expiry. Explained the requirements; customer added an item to meet the minimum and the discount applied.

subject: Promo code says already used
resolution: Code was first-order-only and the customer had ordered before. Offered an alternative active promo that applied successfully.

subject: Allergy concern about a dish
resolution: Advised that allergen tags come from the restaurant and aren't guaranteed. Recommended adding an allergy note at checkout and messaging the restaurant directly. Escalated to a human for the severe-allergy case.

subject: Is this dish gluten free
resolution: Explained dietary tags are restaurant-provided and not guaranteed due to shared kitchens. Advised contacting the restaurant directly to confirm before ordering.

subject: Restaurant missing from the app
resolution: Restaurant was outside the customer's delivery radius and temporarily paused for being busy. Suggested scheduling for later or trying a nearby address. It reappeared once reopened.

subject: Why can't I order from a place I saw yesterday
resolution: Restaurant was closed for the day. Showed the customer how to schedule an order for when it reopens.

subject: Tip adjustment after delivery
resolution: Customer wanted to increase the tip after a great delivery. Showed them the order screen tip adjustment, available up to 1 hour after delivery. 100% goes to the courier.

subject: Added too large a tip by mistake
resolution: Within the 1-hour window, helped the customer reduce the tip from the order screen.

subject: Unauthorized order on account
resolution: Suspected account compromise. Had customer change password, signed out unknown devices under Security → Devices, froze the account, and refunded the unauthorized order after review.

subject: Someone logged into my account
resolution: Walked customer through changing password, signing out all devices, and enabling 2FA. Reviewed recent orders for anything fraudulent.

subject: How do I schedule an order
resolution: Showed customer the Schedule option at checkout to pick a delivery window; explained scheduled orders can be edited or cancelled before prep starts.

subject: Missing item refund to card vs credit
resolution: Explained the choice between instant FoodAssist AI credit and a 3-5 day card refund; customer chose credit for immediate use.

subject: How do I become a delivery driver
resolution: Directed the customer to the courier sign-up flow: provide details and documents, pass a background check, need a smartphone and transport. Couriers earn per delivery plus 100% of tips.

subject: Do you deliver groceries
resolution: Confirmed grocery and convenience stores are available under the Grocery category, with substitutions and per-item refunds for unavailable items.

subject: Item was out of stock
resolution: Restaurant marked an item unavailable. It was refunded automatically; advised the customer to pre-approve substitutions in Order notes next time.

subject: Need an invoice or receipt
resolution: Showed the customer the itemized receipt under Orders → [order] → Receipt, which can be viewed or emailed.

subject: How do I update my saved address
resolution: Walked customer through Account → Addresses to edit the address and add gate code and unit number for couriers.

subject: Turn off marketing notifications
resolution: Showed Account → Notifications to mute promotional notifications while keeping order and delivery alerts on.

subject: Reorder my last meal
resolution: Showed the Reorder button under Orders → past order, which rebuilds the same cart in one tap.

subject: Group order for the office
resolution: Explained Group order: start from a restaurant page, share the link, others add items, organizer pays or splits the bill if supported.

subject: Delivery fee seems high
resolution: Explained delivery fee varies by distance and demand and that FoodAssist Plus waives it on orders over $15. Customer started a Plus free trial.

subject: Want a refund for a bad meal
resolution: Reported via Get help → Food quality with a photo; issued a partial refund and a goodwill credit, and flagged the restaurant.

subject: Order taking much longer than estimated
resolution: Peak Friday-night demand extended prep time. Confirmed courier was assigned and offered a small credit for the delay.

subject: Can I pick up my order instead
resolution: Showed the customer the Pickup option on supported restaurants to skip the delivery fee and collect the order with their name/order number.

subject: Gift card balance not applied
resolution: Gift card needed redeeming under Account → Gift cards to become account credit, which then applies automatically. Resolved.
